_publications._publicationTitle: Analysis of muscle tissue in vivo using fiber-optic autofluorescence and diffuse reflectance spectroscopy.

_contextSnippet: B10WT and B10 mdx mice were compared at 3 weeks, with strong AF separability, AUC = 0.98 and at 10 weeks with AUC = 0.87
details: AF spectroscopy provided strong classification between B10WT and B10 mdx mice at 3 weeks (AUC=0.98) and 10 weeks (AUC=0.87)
